title: FinalScaffold
description: Plugin-native final output. NOT a markdown document (that's the webapp's model). A DECISION SCAFFOLD preserving contradictions, hidden assumptions, trade-offs, and human-required checkpoints. This is the anti-commodity differentiator: Overture plugin outputs decision structure, not solutions.

reframed_question.description: The real question, as surfaced by /overture:clarify. Must not be the user's surface request.

key_trade_offs.description: The axes the user must decide on. NOT the answer — the dimensions.

axis.description: What is being traded. e.g., 'short-term velocity vs long-term maintainability'.

hidden_assumptions.description: Assumptions the scaffold rests on. If any prove false, scaffold collapses.

team_contradictions.description: Where team agents disagreed. CRITICAL: do NOT aggregate away. This is the anti-commodity signal — preserving disagreement.

unresolved.description: True if the user must choose; false if debate resolved it.

human_required_checkpoints.description: Steps the AI explicitly cannot do. These must be surfaced, not buried.

boss_concerns_applied.description: Concerns from /overture:boss that were applied to this scaffold.

boss_concerns_rejected.description: Concerns the user explicitly chose NOT to apply. Preserved for transparency.

boss_questions_pending.description: Questions boss asked (deep mode would_ask) that user has not yet answered. Cleared when user resolves them or starts new draft.

next_actions.description: Concrete, time-bounded actions the user can take immediately after reviewing this scaffold.
